metadata.description: Curated skills for design, research, and writing. Token-efficient, markdown-only, zero dependencies.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: UI/UX design pipeline: discovery interview, core principles, quality audit, and final polish. Use when building interfaces, choosing typography/color, animating components, or auditing existing designs.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research pipeline: literature search, paper reading, hypothesis generation, and systematic field mapping. Use when reading papers, finding sources, generating ideas, or surveying a research area.
